name: extract_clinical_note_features
description: Extract structured features from clinical notes (doctor visits, therapy sessions, follow-ups) for treatment progression tracking

primary_diagnosis.description: Primary medical diagnosis (e.g., 'acute lower back strain', 'rotator cuff tear', 'carpal tunnel syndrome')

severity_assessment.description: Clinical assessment of injury severity: minor (minimal impact), moderate (significant but manageable), major (serious injury), catastrophic (permanent disability)

treatment_provided.description: Treatment provided during this visit (e.g., 'conservative management', 'surgical intervention', 'pain management', 'physical therapy')

medications_prescribed.description: List of medications prescribed (e.g., ['ibuprofen 800mg', 'muscle relaxers', 'opioid pain medication'])

procedures_performed.description: Medical procedures performed during visit (e.g., ['physical examination', 'range of motion testing', 'injection', 'surgical procedure'])

expected_recovery_time.description: Expected recovery timeline (e.g., '4-6 weeks', '3 months', '6-12 months', 'permanent restrictions')

complications_risk.description: Risk of complications or treatment setbacks

functional_limitations.description: Current functional restrictions (e.g., 'lifting restrictions, prolonged sitting limitations', 'no overhead work', 'limited walking distance')

work_capacity_assessment.description: Current work capacity assessment (e.g., 'light duty capable', 'sedentary work only', 'unable to work', 'full duty with restrictions')

treatment_complexity.description: Complexity of treatment plan: simple (basic care), moderate (multiple interventions), complex (specialized/long-term treatment)

ongoing_care_needs.description: Ongoing medical care requirements (e.g., 'follow-up in 2 weeks', 'weekly physical therapy', 'monthly pain management', 'no further treatment needed')

rehabilitation_requirements.description: Physical therapy, occupational therapy, or rehabilitation needs (e.g., 'physical therapy recommended', '12 weeks PT prescribed', 'vocational rehabilitation needed')

specialist_consultations_needed.description: Specialist referrals required (e.g., 'orthopedic if no improvement', 'pain management consultation', 'surgical evaluation needed', 'none')

pain_level_documented.description: Pain level on 0-10 scale as documented

diagnostic_tests_ordered.description: Diagnostic tests ordered (e.g., ['MRI lumbar spine', 'EMG study', 'X-ray'])

work_restrictions.description: Specific work restrictions noted (e.g., ['no lifting over 10 lbs', 'no prolonged standing'])

improvement_noted.description: Whether clinical improvement was noted since last visit

red_flags_medical.description: Medical red flags noted by provider (e.g., ['worsening symptoms despite treatment', 'drug-seeking behavior'])

maximum_medical_improvement.description: Whether MMI (Maximum Medical Improvement) has been reached

narrative_analysis.description: Rich text analysis (500-1000 characters) covering: (1) Clinical progression and treatment response, (2) Changes from previous visits and improvement trajectory, (3) Provider's assessment, concerns, and prognosis, (4) Impact on recovery timeline and return to work capacity, (5) Actuarial implications for cost projections and reserve adequacy

data_quality.description: Quality and completeness of clinical documentation
